description.zh: 香港金融中心，商业精英云集之地。表面光鲜，暗流涌动。
description.en: Hong Kong's financial center, where business elites gather. Gleaming surface, turbulent undercurrents.

historicalNote.zh: 1974年中环已有众多跨国公司入驻，地下赌场和贿赂网络与金融界交织。
historicalNote.en: By 1974, Central was home to many multinationals, with underground casinos and bribery networks intertwined with finance.

description.zh: 湾仔是警队高层的聚集地，也是腐败温床。私人会所里藏着太多秘密。
description.en: Wan Chai is where senior police gather, and a hotbed of corruption. Private clubs hide too many secrets.

historicalNote.zh: 湾仔的私人会所是警察和三合会谈判的重要场所，'和胜和'在此区域势力强大。
historicalNote.en: Wan Chai's private clubs were key venues for police-triad negotiations; 'Wo Shing Wo' was powerful here.

description.zh: 旺角是香港最拥挤的区域，也是地下经济的中心。夜生活、毒品、保护费——这里什么都有。
description.en: Mong Kok is Hong Kong's most crowded area and center of underground economy. Nightlife, drugs, protection money - everything exists here.

historicalNote.zh: 1970年代旺角是14K和新股主要争夺的地盘，每年因帮派冲突死亡数十人。
historicalNote.en: In the 1970s, Mong Kok was a main battleground between 14K and Sun Yee On, with dozens killed annually in gang conflicts.

description.zh: 油麻地是传统街区，果栏和戏院是这里的标志。市井生活掩盖了地下交易。
description.en: Yau Ma Tei is a traditional district, known for its wholesale fruit market and theaters. Everyday life masks underground dealings.

historicalNote.zh: 油麻地果栏是香港最早的黑社会据点之一，通过控制水果批发起家。
historicalNote.en: Yau Ma Tei wholesale fruit market was one of Hong Kong's earliest triad strongholds, built on controlling fruit distribution.

description.zh: 尖沙咀是旅游圣地，维多利亚港的美景背后是对游客下手的小偷和骗子。
description.en: Tsim Sha Tsui is a tourist mecca; behind Victoria Harbour's beauty are thieves and scammers targeting visitors.

historicalNote.zh: 尖沙咀的海运码头是走私的重要通道，海关和黑帮在此长期博弈。
historicalNote.en: Tsim Sha Tsui's shipping terminals were key smuggling routes, with customs and triads in perpetual conflict.

description.zh: 三不管地带。警察不敢进，政府管不了。这里是罪恶的终极避难所。
description.en: A no-man's land. Police dare not enter, the government cannot govern. The ultimate sanctuary of crime.

historicalNote.zh: 九龙城寨在1974年是世界上人口密度最高的地区，三合会、毒贩和无政府状态共存。直到1993年才被清拆。
historicalNote.en: In 1974, Kowloon Walled City was the world's most densely populated area, where triads, drug dealers, and anarchy coexisted. It was demolished in 1993.

description.zh: 新界是香港的后花园，乡村和农田居多。但即将到来的地产开发浪潮将改变一切。
description.en: The New Territories are Hong Kong's backyard, mostly villages and farmland. But incoming development will change everything.

historicalNote.zh: 1970年代新界开始大规模开发，地产商与黑社会联手强征土地，引发大量社会矛盾。
historicalNote.en: In the 1970s, the New Territories saw massive development, with developers and triads collaborating on land seizures, creating much social conflict.

description.zh: 北角警署是你的起点。这里曾经是模范警署——直到你发现真相。
description.en: North Point Station is your starting point. It was once a model station - until you discovered the truth.

historicalNote.zh: 北角在1970年代是上海移民聚居区，警察和本地帮派的冲突时有发生。
historicalNote.en: In the 1970s, North Point was a Shanghai immigrant enclave, with periodic conflicts between police and local gangs.

description.zh: 警察总部所在地。香港执法系统的神经中枢。这里是权力最集中、也最危险的地方。
description.en: Police Headquarters. The nerve center of Hong Kong's law enforcement. Where power is most concentrated - and most dangerous.

historicalNote.zh: 军器厂街警察总部建于1952年，1974年正值警队腐败调查的高峰期，高层人人自危。
historicalNote.en: Arsenal Street Police HQ was built in 1952; by 1974, at the peak of corruption investigations, senior officers were in fear.
